roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC 3455/X: ALSO PRESENT IN COURT IS CHRISTINE HEINZ, SAN FRANCISCO ADULT PROBATIONDEPARTMENT,/X:PETITION IS WITHDRAWN,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN ONPOST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION UNDER THE SAME TERMS AND CONDITIONS,/

/CAL:O,R, RELEASE/X:APD GRANTS THE DEFENDANT A TRAVEL PASS TO BE RELEASEDON 11-24-15 AND TORETURN ON NEXT COURT DATE OF 12-04-15/ /X:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO APD IMMEDIATELY AFTER RELEASE AND IF APD IS CLOSED, THEN DEFENDANTTO REPORT TO APD THE FOLLOWING DAY/OR/X:COURT DATE OF 12-04-15 IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RELEASE ON O,R, IS DENIED/SHER/NB/X:POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION IS ADMINSTRATIVELY REVOKED/CONTD:TS APD 3455PC HEARING IN DEPT 26/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET APD 3455PC-PRCS/CONTD:O,R, RELEASE ON 11-24-15/DOP/CONTD:INFORMAL HEARING ON 12-04-15/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET APD 3455PC HEARING/CONTD:     ADP 3455 PC PRCS HEARING/DOP  /
